name: Posterior Deltoid (Rear Delt)

landmarks.notes: Commonly undertrained; gets partial indirect work from horizontal rowing. Tolerates high direct volume. Estimate only.

frequency_notes: ~2-3x/week; pairs naturally with back and side-delt work.
training_notes: Reverse pec-deck, cable rear-delt flyes, and wide-elbow rows. Keep loads light and reps higher; effort near failure matters more than heavy weight.
